member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter
member.summary: Backward compatibility adapter that wraps new interfaces to provide the old ITextEmbeddingStore interface. This allows gradual migration from the old architecture to the new one. Mark as [Obsolete] after migration is complete.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.#ctor(Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator)
member.summary: Creates an adapter from the new architecture components.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.#ctor(Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore)
member.summary: Creates an adapter with an existing EmbeddingService.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.StoreEmbedding(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Legacy method: Stores text by generating its embedding. Maps to EmbeddingService.StoreTextAsync.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.GetEmbedding(System.String)
member.summary: Legacy method: Retrieves an embedding by key. Maps to IEmbeddingStore.GetAsync.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.RemoveEmbedding(System.String)
member.summary: Legacy method: Removes an embedding. Maps to IEmbeddingStore.RemoveAsync.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter.Embeddings
member.summary: Legacy property: Returns all embeddings as an array. Only works if the underlying store implements IEnumerableEmbeddingStore. WARNING: This loads all embeddings into memory - not suitable for large datasets.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService
member.summary: Orchestration service that combines embedding generation and storage. This replaces the logic in AbstractTextEmbeddingStore, properly separating concerns.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.#ctor(Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator)
member.summary: Creates a new EmbeddingService.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.StoreTextAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores text by generating its embedding. Uses checksum-based caching to avoid regenerating unchanged content.
member.param: The text content to embed and store
member.returns: True if embedding was generated/updated, false if cached (no change)

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.StoreEmbeddingAsync(System.String,Embedding,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores pre-computed embedding directly without generation. Useful when embeddings are computed externally or in batch.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.StoreBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores multiple texts in batch, generating embeddings for each. More efficient than calling StoreTextAsync in a loop.
member.param: Collection of key-value pairs to store
member.returns: Number of embeddings generated (excludes cached items)

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an embedding by key.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.RemoveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes an embedding from the store.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if an embedding exists.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingService.GenerateQueryEmbeddingAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an embedding for a query without storing it. Useful for search operations.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LLMEmbeddingGenerator
member.summary: Implementation of IEmbeddingGenerator that uses an ILLMClient to generate embeddings. Wraps the LLM client to separate embedding generation from storage concerns.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LLMEmbeddingGenerator.Dimensions
member.summary: The dimensionality of embeddings produced by this generator.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LLMEmbeddingGenerator.#ctor(Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new LLMEmbeddingGenerator.
member.param: The LLM client to use for generating embeddings
Expected embedding dimensions (default: 1536 for OpenAI models)

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LLMEmbeddingGenerator.GenerateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an embedding vector for the given text.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.LLMEmbeddingGenerator.GenerateBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates embeddings for multiple texts in a batch. Currently processes sequentially - can be optimized for parallel/batch processing.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IBatchEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Interface for embedding stores that support efficient batch operations. Useful for bulk ingestion and retrieval scenarios.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IBatchEmbeddingStore.StoreBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,Embedding,System.String}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores multiple embeddings in a single batch operation.
member.param: Collection of key, embedding, and checksum tuples

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IBatchEmbeddingStore.GetBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves multiple embeddings in a single batch operation.
member.returns: List of found embeddings (may be fewer than requested keys)

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator
member.summary: Interface for generating embeddings from text. Separates embedding generation from storage concerns.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator.GenerateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an embedding vector for the given text.
member.param: The text to generate an embedding for

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator.GenerateBatchAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates embeddings for multiple texts in a batch. Implementations may optimize for batch processing.
member.param: The texts to generate embeddings for
member.returns: List of embeddings in the same order as input texts

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator.Dimensions
member.summary: The dimensionality of the embeddings produced by this generator.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Core interface for storing and retrieving embeddings. Focused solely on CRUD operations without embedding generation or search logic.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore.StoreAsync(System.String,Embedding,System.String)
member.summary: Stores an embedding with its associated key and checksum.
member.param: Checksum of the source text for cache invalidation
member.returns: True if stored successfully, false otherwise

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an embedding by its key.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore.RemoveAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes an embedding from the store.
member.param: Unique identifier for the embedding to remove
member.returns: True if removed successfully, false if not found

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore.ExistsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if an embedding exists in the store.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEnumerableEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Interface for embedding stores that support full enumeration. Only implement this for small-scale stores (file-based, in-memory). Large-scale stores (databases with millions of embeddings) should NOT implement this.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEnumerableEmbeddingStore.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all embeddings from the store. WARNING: Use with caution on large datasets - may cause memory issues.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IVectorSearchStore
member.summary: Interface for vector similarity search operations. Implementations can use native vector search (pgvector, FAISS) or fallback to in-memory search.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IVectorSearchStore.SearchSimilarAsync(Embedding,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches for embeddings similar to the query embedding.
member.param: The embedding vector to search for
Maximum number of results to return
member.returns: List of scored embeddings ordered by similarity (highest first)

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult
member.summary: Represents a document search result with similarity score. This is a cleaner alternative to RelevantEmbedding without callback dependencies.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.Key
member.summary: Unique identifier for the document chunk.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.Similarity
member.summary: Cosine similarity score (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.StoreName
member.summary: Name of the store this result came from (useful for multi-store searches).

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.ParentDocumentKey
member.summary: Parent document key if this is a chunk.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.Checksum
member.summary: Checksum of the source text.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata for extensibility.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.DocumentSearchResult.Text
member.summary: The actual text content (populated separately if needed).

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.ScoredEmbedding
member.summary: Represents an embedding with its similarity score from a vector search operation.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.ScoredEmbedding.Info
member.summary: The embedding information (key, checksum, vector data).

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.ScoredEmbedding.Similarity
member.summary: Cosine similarity score (0.0 to 1.0, where 1.0 is identical).

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.ScoredEmbedding.ParentDocumentKey
member.summary: Optional parent document key for chunk-to-document mapping.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.ScoredEmbedding.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata for extensibility.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.PgVectorStore
member.summary: PostgreSQL + pgvector implementation with native vector search support. Implements efficient similarity search using pgvector's distance operators. This is the refactored version replacing PgVectorTextEmbeddingStore.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.PgVectorStore.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new PgVectorStore.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.PgVectorStore.CreateIndexAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a vector index for efficient similarity search. Call this after bulk ingestion for optimal search performance.
member.param: Number of lists for IVFFlat (ignored for HNSW)

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.PgVectorStore.SearchSimilarAsync(Embedding,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs native vector similarity search using pgvector's cosine distance operator. This is 10-100x faster than loading all embeddings and computing similarity in-memory.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingJsonFileStore.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new EmbeddingJsonFileStore.
member.param: Path to the JSON file for storing embeddings

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingJsonFileStore.Reload
member.summary: Reloads embeddings from disk. Useful if the file was modified externally.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingJsonFileStore.SearchSimilarAsync(Embedding,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: In-memory vector search using cosine similarity. Suitable for small datasets. For large datasets, use PgVectorStore.

member.name: T:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingMemoryStore
member.summary: In-memory embedding store. Data is lost when the process terminates. Useful for testing, caching, or temporary storage scenarios. This is the refactored version replacing TextEmbeddingMemoryStore.

member.name: P:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingMemoryStore.Count
member.summary: Gets the current count of embeddings in the store.

member.name: M:Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.EmbeddingMemoryStore.Clear
member.summary: Clears all embeddings from the store.

member.name: T:AbstractTextEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Legacy abstract base class for text embedding storage.
member.remarks: This class is obsolete. Use the new architecture instead: - Implement IEmbeddingStore for storage operations - Implement IVectorSearchStore for similarity search - Use EmbeddingService for orchestration with checksum-based caching

member.name: M:EmbeddingStoreFactory.Register(System.String,System.Func{System.String,Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient,ITextEmbeddingStore})
member.summary: Registers a legacy factory for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:EmbeddingStoreFactory.RegisterNew(System.String,System.Func{System.String,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingStore})
member.summary: Registers a new factory using the refactored architecture.

member.name: M:EmbeddingStoreFactory.CreateFromSpec(System.String,Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient)
member.summary: Creates a legacy ITextEmbeddingStore (backward compatible).

member.name: M:EmbeddingStoreFactory.CreateNew(System.String,Hazina.Store.EmbeddingStore.IEmbeddingGenerator)
member.summary: Creates a new IEmbeddingStore using the refactored architecture. Returns both the store and vector search capability if supported.

member.name: M:EmbeddingStoreFactory.CreateLegacyAdapter(System.String,Hazina.LLMs.ILLMClient,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a legacy adapter from the new architecture for backward compatibility. Use this when you need ITextEmbeddingStore but want to use the new architecture.

member.name: T:ITextEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Legacy interface for text embedding storage.
member.remarks:
This interface is obsolete. Use the new architecture instead: - IEmbeddingStore for storage operations - IVectorSearchStore for similarity search - IEmbeddingGenerator for embedding generation - EmbeddingService for orchestration
For backward compatibility, use LegacyTextEmbeddingStoreAdapter to wrap the new components.

member.name: T:PgVectorTextEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Legacy PostgreSQL + pgvector embedding store.
member.remarks: This class is obsolete. Use PgVectorStore instead for: - Better separation of concerns (no embedding generation in storage) - Native vector search with pgvector operators (10-100x faster) - No memory overhead from caching all embeddings - Support for vector indices (HNSW, IVFFlat)

member.name: T:SqliteTextEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Placeholder SQLite embedding store (never fully implemented).
member.remarks: This class was a placeholder and is now obsolete. If you need SQLite storage, implement IEmbeddingStore with SQLite backend. Consider using EmbeddingJsonFileStore or PgVectorStore for production use.

member.name: T:FaissTextEmbeddingStore
member.summary: Placeholder FAISS embedding store (never fully implemented).
member.remarks: This class was a placeholder and is now obsolete. If you need FAISS vector search, implement IEmbeddingStore + IVectorSearchStore with FAISS backend. Consider using PgVectorStore with HNSW indices for production vector search.

member.name: T:EmbeddingFileStore
member.summary: Legacy file-based embedding store.
member.remarks: This class is obsolete. Use EmbeddingJsonFileStore instead for: - Better separation of concerns (no embedding generation in storage) - Cleaner API with focused interfaces - Thread-safe operations - Better error handling

member.name: T:TextEmbeddingMemoryStore
member.summary: Legacy in-memory embedding store.
member.remarks: This class is obsolete. Use EmbeddingMemoryStore instead for: - Better separation of concerns (no embedding generation in storage) - Dictionary-based storage for faster lookups - Batch operations support - Native vector search capability - Thread-safe operations
